description: Autonomous warehouse robotics orchestration with inventory priority shedding.
challenge: A warehouse running automated robotic inventory systems must continue essential operations during power or network constraints. Standard systems halt completely during outages, blocking shipment.
response: VITO prioritizes high-value inventory during power constraints, gracefully sheds lower-priority retrieval tasks, and maintains complete audit trail of all inventory movements.
result: Uninterrupted fulfillment of critical orders, predictable SLA performance, and regulatory-grade inventory records.
